name: Nut Thins
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend sugar and butter together until smooth.
2. Add the well-beaten eggs, then sift in flour and salt.
3. Mix in chopped nuts and vanilla extract until combined.
4. Scoop spoonfuls of dough onto a baking sheet, spacing them well apart.
5. Bake at 300°F (150°C) until golden brown.
